seo.title: Lawyer in Township, Lahore | Family, Property & Rental Matters
seo.description: Township Lahore lawyer for family law, property, rental disputes, and civil matters. Saeed Law Firm — established 1975.

hero.intro: Township Lahore lawyer for family law, property, rental disputes, and civil matters. Saeed Law Firm — established 1975.

bodyMarkdown:
Township is one of Lahore's larger LDA-developed schemes, sitting south-west of central Lahore between Allama Iqbal Town and Green Town. Its mixed residential-commercial profile with significant rental stock generates a steady stream of property, family, and civil work. The legal-case profile of a **lawyer in Township Lahore** is well-distributed across practice areas — no single category dominates, which makes a multi-practice firm the natural fit. **Saeed Law Firm** has served Township residents across its sectors since the scheme matured. Our office at 13 Fane Road is a 30-minute drive from central Township.

### Township-Specific Matters We Handle

**Family and matrimonial cases.** Divorce, khula, child custody, maintenance, and dower recovery — see our [family lawyer in Lahore](/family-lawyer-in-lahore) page for the practice-area dimension.

**Rental disputes.** Township has substantial rental stock, both residential and commercial. Eviction under the Punjab Rented Premises Act 2009 for non-payment, breach, or personal need is frequent.

**Property mutation.** LDA-related transfer and mutation work, including inheritance-driven mutation and sale-purchase mutation.

**Civil suits for declaration.** Title disputes, ownership clarifications, and declaration work tied to Township properties.

**Inheritance and partition.** Successor certificates from Civil Court Lahore and partition suits where co-heirs disagree.

**Specific performance.** Section 12 Specific Relief Act 1877 suits where Township sellers refuse to register after agreement and earnest payment.

### Where Township Matters Are Heard

- **LDA internal grievance** for plot file matters
- **Civil Courts Lahore** at Aiwan-e-Adal — civil suits and partition ([court page →](/courts/district-court-lawyer-lahore))
- **Family Courts** at Aiwan-e-Adal ([court page →](/courts/family-court-lawyer-lahore))
- **Revenue Authorities** for mutation matters
- **Lahore High Court** for second appeals and writ jurisdiction ([court page →](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court))

### Travel and Consultation

Office to central Township: ~30 minutes by car. Zoom and WhatsApp consultations available; documentary intake before consultation lets us focus the meeting on substance.

### Why Saeed Law Firm for Township

- 50+ years of Lahore practice including LDA-scheme experience
- Multi-practice — family, property, civil, rental work under one roof
- Office in central Lahore with easy court access at Aiwan-e-Adal and the LHC

### Frequently Asked Questions

**Where do I file a Township rental eviction case?**
At the Civil Court Lahore under the Punjab Rented Premises Act 2009.

**Can LDA cancel my Township plot?**
LDA can cancel allotments on grounds specified in the allotment letter and rules — typically arrears, default, or breach. Cancellation is challengeable through internal grievance, civil court, and LHC writ jurisdiction.

**Where are family courts for Township residents?**
At the Family Court complex, Aiwan-e-Adal, Mall Road, Lahore.

**How long does a Township partition suit take?**
2–5 years contested at Civil Court Lahore. Family settlement and registered partition deeds can resolve faster where heirs agree.

**How much does a lawyer in Township Lahore charge?**
Standard firm rates — initial consultation PKR 5,000–10,000, fixed-fee for routine matters, stage-based for litigation.

### Township Sectors We Serve

Township is laid out in numbered sectors with a dense mix of residential properties, commercial strips, and educational institutions. Our lawyer in Township Lahore practice serves residents across all sectors of Township — including the established residential blocks adjoining Allama Iqbal Town, the commercial corridor running through central Township, and the southern fringe abutting Green Town. Each sector brings a slightly different case profile: older sectors generate more inheritance and partition work, while newer commercial expansions produce more rental and lease disputes.

### Common Township Legal Patterns

The most frequent matters we handle for Township clients are: (1) LDA plot transfer disputes — Township is an LDA-developed scheme and most property issues route through LDA's internal process before reaching civil court; (2) rental and ejectment cases under the Punjab Rented Premises Act 2009; (3) inheritance and partition for properties held across multiple heirs without clean mutation; (4) family-law matters reflecting the area's stable resident base. Sale-purchase enforcement under Section 12 of the Specific Relief Act 1877 is another regular engagement where a Township seller has accepted earnest payment but refuses to register the property.

### Related Lahore Practice Pages

See our [property lawyer in Lahore](/property-lawyer-in-lahore), [family lawyer in Lahore](/family-lawyer-in-lahore), and [civil lawyer in Lahore](/civil-lawyer-in-lahore) pages for practice-area depth. To meet [Bilal Saeed, Advocate](/team/bilal-saeed-advocate), [book a consultation](/contact-us).

details.label: Travel From Our Office
values: ~30 minutes by car from Fane Road

faqs.q: How do I book a consultation with Saeed Law Firm?
faqs.a: Use the contact form on this site, call our Fane Road office, or WhatsApp us. We respond within one business day and schedule a same-week appointment for most matters.

faqs.q: Do you serve clients outside Lahore?
faqs.a: Yes. We represent clients across Pakistan and overseas Pakistanis, with primary court appearances in Lahore. Remote consultations are available via Zoom and WhatsApp.

relatedPages.title: Family Lawyer in Lahore
relatedPages.description: Hire an experienced family lawyer in Lahore. Saeed Law Firm handles divorce, khula, child custody, and nikah disputes at Lahore Family Courts. Established 1975.

relatedPages.title: Property Lawyer in Lahore
relatedPages.description: Property lawyer in Lahore handling land disputes, mutation (intiqal), inheritance partition, DHA/LDA matters, and rental disputes. 50+ years' experience.

relatedPages.title: Civil Lawyer in Lahore
relatedPages.description: Civil lawyer in Lahore handling suits for declaration, possession, recovery, specific performance, and damages at Civil Courts and Lahore High Court.
